name: minwon-draft
description: Compose copy-paste-ready 국민신문고 민원 / 안전신문고 안전신고 (Korean government e-petition & safety-report) content from raw facts. 6-section assert-then-confirm method, live statute verification via the bundled korean-law-mcp connector, an adversarial self-review, and a response-contingency plan.

law_oc.title: 법제처 API 키 (LAW_OC) — optional, enables live statute verification
law_oc.description: Free from https://open.law.go.kr/LSO/openApi/guideList.do (sign up, request 'Open API 사용 신청' — takes ~1 minute). Enables live citation verification via korean-law-mcp. You can leave this blank: the skill still drafts the petition, but statute citations are tagged '⚠️ 미검증' for you to verify by hand.
